claimBoundary: license intake gate only; not legal advice, redistribution approval, production readiness, Quest readiness, clinical validity, or scoring validity
currentDecision: Do not materialize MPFB/MakeHuman garment assets into committed runtime paths until a specific garment allowlist entry satisfies every required field.
recommendedDefault: Use local procedural garment fitter only for pipeline testing; use MPFB/MakeHuman garment meshes only after allowlist/provenance completion.
